Who We Are

Built on Integrity, Rooted in Long Beach

Innovative Fence, Inc. started with a simple goal: to provide Long Beach residents with fences that not only look great but also stand the test of time. Founded by a Long Beach native, we understand the unique challenges our coastal climate presents, from intense sun to occasional flooding.

We approach every project with a commitment to quality, using only the best materials and proven techniques. Our team takes pride in delivering exceptional results, whether it's a small repair or a complete fence installation. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and exceeding expectations.

As a local business, we're deeply invested in the Long Beach community. We support local initiatives and strive to be a responsible neighbor. When you choose Innovative Fence, you're not just getting a fence; you're supporting a business that cares about its community.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Innovative Fence, Inc

Climate-Resistant Materials

We select materials specifically for Long Beach's weather, ensuring longevity and minimal maintenance.

Custom Designs

From classic Craftsman to modern styles, we tailor every fence to complement your home's architecture.

Expert Installation

Our skilled team ensures precise installation for maximum stability and performance.

Transparent Pricing

We provide clear, detailed quotes with no hidden fees, so you know exactly what to expect.

Protect Your Property Today

Get a free estimate for your custom fence project in Long Beach and surrounding areas.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Innovative Fence did an amazing job installing our new redwood fence. The crew was professional, efficient, and the fence looks fantastic! It really enhances our property. Highly recommend!

Maria S. Wood Fence Installation
“

Our chain link fence was damaged in a recent storm, and Innovative Fence came out quickly to repair it. They were able to fix it at a reasonable price, and now our yard is secure again. Great service!

David K. Chain Link Fence Repair
“

We are so happy with our new vinyl fence! It looks great and requires no maintenance which is exactly what we wanted. The installation team was friendly and professional. Thanks, Innovative Fence!

Jessica L. Vinyl Fence Installation
“

Our gate was sagging and difficult to open. Innovative Fence fixed it quickly and efficiently. Now it swings smoothly and closes securely. Excellent workmanship!

Robert B. Gate Repair
“

We chose an aluminum fence for our pool area, and Innovative Fence did a fantastic job. The fence is beautiful and provides the safety we need. The team was professional and courteous throughout the entire process.

Susan P. Aluminum Fence Installation
“

From start to finish, the experience with Innovative Fence was seamless. They helped us design a fence that perfectly complements our Craftsman home in Belmont Shore. The quality of the materials and workmanship is outstanding.

Michael T. Wood Fence Installation

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of wood is best for a fence in Long Beach?
Redwood and cedar are excellent choices due to their natural resistance to rot and insects. Pressure-treated pine is also a good option for its affordability and durability.
How often should I stain or seal my wood fence?
We recommend staining or sealing your wood fence every 2-3 years to protect it from the elements and maintain its appearance.
Can you match my existing fence style?
Yes, we can create a custom wood fence that matches your existing fence style and complements your home's architecture.
